prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit (engine code: M20A-FKS, 2.0L turbocharged inline-4) with 8.5 psi boost, paired with a custom-mapped ECU using OpenFlash Tablet Stage 2+ tune, targeting 320 hp and 350 lb-ft torque with 93 octane fuel

Full bolt-on exhaust system by Borla Atak (cat-back, 3.5" diameter, T304 stainless steel) with custom 4-2-1 unequal-length headers by Tomei for the M20A-FKS, featuring 4-1 merge collectors and 304 stainless steel construction, retaining the OEM catalytic converters for emissions compliance

Suspension overhaul with KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8" front/9" rear travel, monotube design) paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings, alongside a custom-fabricated front strut tower brace by Cusco for chassis rigidity
estetica: Widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny RAV4 Adventure V3 kit (FRP construction, 3" wider front fenders, 4" wider rear fenders) with custom-molded carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon, finished in Toyota Adventure Grade Cement Gray with matte black accents

OEM+ lighting upgrade with Morimoto XB LED headlights (DRL/low/high beam, 5500K color temperature) and Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights, paired with custom sequential LED taillights by VLEDS (M-Sport style, sequential turn signals, smoked lenses)

Functional aero and off-road hybrid setup: Front Runner Slimline II roof rack with custom Molle panel integration, paired with a Principle Tuning front winch bumper (steel construction, 3.5" lift clearance, integrated D-ring mounts) and BFGoodrich KO2 all-terrain tires (245/65R17 on Method MR701 wheels, 17x8.5, +15mm offset)
